payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Single tall, dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central rectangular panel and simple surrounding frame; surface shows vertical wood grain and a slight sheen, no visible hardware, and the right edge is slightly cropped; appears approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"tall dark-stained wooden cabinet door","long_description":"Single tall, dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central rectangular panel and simple surrounding frame; surface shows vertical wood grain and a slight sheen, no visible hardware, and the right edge is slightly cropped; appears approximately 0.8 m from the camera.","attributes":["dark brown stain","wood grain visible","recessed central panel","rectangular vertical shape","no visible handle or knob","slight sheen on surface","right edge slightly cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
